# SCDynamicStoreGetTypeID()

**Function**

Returns the type identifier of all `SCDynamicStore` instances.

## Declaration

```swift
func SCDynamicStoreGetTypeID() -> CFTypeID
```

## Return Value

The type identifier of all `SCDynamicStore` instances.
